_comment: Phase A2 NPC merchants + Phase C's cloud_reaches resident. Loaded by engine/npc_loader.py. `region` gates residency per Phase B2's engine.npcs.npcs_in_town_today -- the NPC whose region matches the player's current_region is always in town; the remaining daily-rotation slot(s) are filled from the rest. Each has a signature_deal_item_id pointing at a stock entry priced below the regular shop, and one repeatable weekly fetch quest.

npcs.name: Kip
npcs.tagline: Retired kernel dev. Debugged the scheduler so you don't have to.

quest.description: Bring me 5 Kernel Fragments and I'll make it worth your while.

npcs.name: Voss
npcs.tagline: Startup founder. Everything is pre-seed, including this capsule.

quest.description: We're bootstrapped. Bring 8 Scrap Silicon and I'll pay you in runway.

npcs.name: Nyx
npcs.tagline: Night-owl sysadmin. Only replies to pings sent after midnight.

quest.description: The rack's overheating again. 6 Thermal Paste and I'll cut you a deal.

npcs.name: The Intern
npcs.tagline: Nobody remembers hiring them. They have root on everything.

quest.description: Don't ask where these go. Just bring 3 Void Shards.

npcs.name: Skye
npcs.tagline: SRE balloonist. Keeps five nines aloft with a wicker basket and a prayer.

quest.description: The availability zone's drifting again. Bring me 5 Cloud Essence and I'll radio back a favor.
